why: xa-uploader UI review found the sync panel uses a flat list with no grouping and native unstyled checkboxes, making it inconsistent with the rest of the gate-* design-system UI and harder for operators to orient quickly to what they need to confirm before publishing.
intended_outcome_statement: CatalogSyncPanel.client.tsx renders sync options in two visually grouped sections (Validation / Run modifiers), using design-system-styled checkboxes with gate-* tokens, consistent with RegistryCheckboxGrid.client.tsx and the rest of the xa-uploader operator tool.
